transcript.clean_text: stage 18 of the tour de france had seen another exhibition from yumbo fisma watfonart and the rest of the team setting up yonas vengagor who left behind tadepogacha and put a firm grasp on the tour de france 3 26 now between vingagor and pogacha with the mountain stages having finished to stage 19 three days to go until the end of the race anything still able to happen but on a flat parkour it could have been one for the sprinters or the breakaway but with crosswinds forecast the riders were ready for anything the stage would start in castello manueg and head north north northeast in fact going through us home of the late nikola portal before finishing in cow wind blowing from left to right for most of the day 188 kilometers on the menu and a few lumps and bumps along the way there was no big fight for the breakaway in the end five riders got away but they were not allowed too much time up the road another protest interrupted the talk but after a very short break riders were back on their bikes the breakaways gap was restored and the race got back underway through the intermediate sprint queen simmons took the 20 points the peloton then honored the late nicola portal former sports director at team sky philippe gilbert jung from kerspalk and the rest continued to chase almost bringing back the break at one stage one man did drop back from the break that'd be nils pollock but honor a continued fatherhorn was with him as was maharich it was in the town of losert but things began to change 53 kilometers remaining the first of two fourth category climbs on the day simmons attacking maharich briefly going with him but only briefly simmons continued for a little while longer alone but would eventually be caught the three remaining riders were first to be swallowed up by what was left of the peloton in danger itself of splitting over the second categorized climb a big no-no from the american no chance with 35 k's to go that apoga continued in his racing spirit but he was never going to pull back the time required to take the yellow jersey attacking on a day like this there was a strong attack that went away though alexey gujar followed by jasper and fred wright they get around half a minute of a gap and work really well together cathagno the last of the quick step riders to give up the chase and it was in the balance inside the final four kilometers lotto sudah putting in a few desperate turns to try and bring caleb into the equation but eventually they'd be caught and with one point four kilometers remaining christophe lapot would bridge the gap while not having done his work this time laporte going around what was left of the breakaway launching his own sprint and taking it all the way to the finish line 29 years of age a first tour de france stage win for him a fifth for his team at this race still with two days to go and more importantly for the host nation a first french stage win in 38 long stages ala philippe on stage one last year all the way to la porte on stage 19 in 2022 the onboard visma winning stage is back-to-back with different riders the dutch team has had three different winners at this tour so far laporte ahead of philips and dainese with seneschal and pogachar in the top five another day ticked off for yellow and green lingagort leading by 3 21 now ahead of pogaccha thomas at eight minutes with gaudu fourth and quintana in fifth there was a slight changes with the odd second an odd split going into the 40.7 kilometer time trial time trial to jokamadur three checks along the way a long gold ride and you'll be able to watch the decisive time trial of this 2022 tour de france live and on demand on gcn plus and a reminder the tour de france fam avec zwift will be live and on demand from sunday
